# Curfew Festival 2026

> Non-profit open-air house music festival in Ghent, Belgium.

## Key Facts
- Date: Saturday 6 June 2026
- Location: Blaarmeersen, Ghent, Belgium
- Type: Daytime open-air house music festival
- Organizer: Curfew (VZW Lada), non-profit
- Founded: 2015
- History: 10+ years, 100+ events, 40,000+ people
- Tagline: In House We Trust
- Website: https://curfew.events
- Tickets: https://www.tiqs.com/alfred/events/shop/4789
- Email: info@curfew.events
- Instagram: @curfew.events

## Lineup 2026
- Ian Pooley (LIVE) — Germany — Deep house/techno pioneer, exclusive live hardware set
- Pabels (DJ SET) — Colombia — House, disco, balearic
- Walashi (DJ SET) — Syria / Dubai — Middle Eastern house, Boiler Room alumni
- More artists to be announced

## Ticket Prices
- Pre-Release: €20 (sold out)
- Early Birds: €25 (on sale)
- Wave 1: €30
- Wave 2: €35
- Final Wave: €40
- Door Sale: €45

## About
Curfew started in 2015 with a simple idea: create a space where house music feels like home. A group of friends in Ghent, Belgium, who believed the dancefloor could be something more than a night out — it could be a community. Every event goes back into the music, the people, and the experience. No investors, no corporate agenda.

## Upcoming Events
- Mo'Juice x Curfew: Friday 7 November 2026 at Club Wintercircus, Ghent (Kamma & Masalo, Forbidden Fruit, Nico Juice & Mo Disko)
- Curfew Open Air: Sunday 26 October 2026 (location TBA)
